message:
evidence(wa-1u90p.1.3): runtime lock/memory telemetry samples and percentile rollups

Add telemetry evidence artifacts captured from live ft watcher runtime
via 'ft status --health -f json' at 1-second sampling intervals.

resize_baseline_timeline_rollup_2026-02-14.json:
- Consolidated 4-scenario (R1..R4) timeline rollup with queue-depth
  and stage-tail metrics from deterministic simulation replay.

runtime_lock_memory_samples_2026-02-14T0625Z.jsonl:
runtime_lock_memory_percentiles_2026-02-14T0625Z.json:
- 30-sample idle baseline (CalmOwl): watcher_running=true but
  observed_panes=0 (WezTerm CLI unavailable in PATH). Validates
  telemetry export path and establishes idle-condition floor.

runtime_lock_memory_samples_2026-02-14T0633Z.jsonl:
runtime_lock_memory_percentiles_2026-02-14T0633Z.json:
- 30-sample active-pane capture (CloudyRaven): observed_panes=12
  stable across all samples with non-zero cursor snapshot memory
  (~193 KiB p50) and lock wait/hold within SLO thresholds.
  Required WezTerm env/socket configuration for this host.
  Closes the active-pane telemetry discovery gap for wa-1u90p.1.3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
